The company, listed as IFS on both the Bolsa de Valores de Lima (BVL) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), scheduled the conference call for Thursday, February [date to be provided]. The call will offer insights into the financial performance of the company during the mentioned quarter.

data.title: Nucor stock drops after missing Q4 earnings estimates. Revenue at $7.69B (vs. $7.87B est.), EPS $1.64 (vs. $1.99 est.).
data.description: Nucor Corp (NYSE: NUE) recently released its Q4 financial results, revealing revenue of $7.69 billion, which fell short of analyst predictions of $7.87 billion. Earnings per share for the quarter were reported at $1.64, lower than the estimated $1.99 per share. The company experienced declines in its steel mills segment earnings, ascribed to decreased volumes and margin compression, particularly in the sheet sector. Earnings from the steel products segment also decreased due to lower volumes and increased average costs per ton. Nucor stock is currently showing a notable trend, prompting speculation on the future of NUE shares. For a detailed account of the report, interested parties can access the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 4DMedical raises over $100M to expand in the US, enhance lung imaging tech. Strong backing for CT:VQ™ product.
data.description: A significant amount of funding has been secured to expand hospital installations for the innovative CT:VQ™ imaging technology. This funding will not only support research and development efforts but also provide assistance to early adopters such as Stanford, Cleveland Clinic, University of Miami, and UC San Diego Health. The funding will enable widespread adoption of the technology by medical facilities and drive further advancements in healthcare. The partnership between Los Angeles and Melbourne, Australia-based company 4DMedical is set to revolutionize the medical industry with its cutting-edge imaging product.

data.title: Figure Technology Solutions (Nasdaq: FIGR) to announce Q4 and FY 2025 results on Feb 26, 2026, after market close. Conference call at 4:30pm ET.
data.description: Figure Technology Solutions, a prominent blockchain-based capital marketplace (Nasdaq: FIGR), revealed its intentions to disclose the Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 financial outcomes on Thursday, February 26, 2026, post-market closure. The conference call, scheduled for 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day, will delve into the company's results, future prospects, and other pertinent topics.

data.title: Roofing Expert John Kolarik advises on roof snow removal in Traverse City to prevent damage.
data.description: In Traverse City, Michigan, on January 26, 2026, Roofing Expert John Kolarik from Mariage Roofing emphasizes the significance of removing snow from roofs to prevent damage. A recent HelloNation article addresses this issue, highlighting the critical nature of timely snow removal for homeowners. John Kolarik provides valuable insights on the potential risks associated with snow accumulation on roofs, stressing the need for prompt action. It is essential for homeowners to stay vigilant and clear snow from their roofs promptly to avoid structural damage.

data.title: San Francisco Peninsula starts culinary initiative to celebrate diverse dining landscape with new programming in multi-year plan.
data.description: A multi-year culinary initiative has been launched in San Mateo County, California, specifically on the San Francisco Peninsula. This initiative aims to celebrate the diverse dining landscape of the region through new programming. This endeavor will span across several years and will focus on showcasing the varied culinary offerings in the area.

data.description: The base shelf prospectus is now available for public access, while the Canadian prospectus supplement will be accessible within the next two business days. Both documents can be found on the company's issuer profile on the SEDAR website.

data.title: 31% of Americans, especially young individuals, are optimistic about prediction markets reshaping culture, as per a recent survey.
data.description: According to a recent survey, approximately 31% of the American population, with a higher percentage among young individuals, believe that prediction markets will have a significant impact on reshaping culture.

data.title: VanEck introduces AVAX fund, making Avalanche the first altcoin to have a US ETF for investors, including traditional equities.
data.description: The Avalanche (AVAX) altcoin has recently been included in a spot ETF, enabling investors to access the token in addition to conventional equities.

data.title: Frontdoor, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTDR) plans to reveal Q4 and full-year 2025 financials on Feb. 26, 2026, 7:30am CST. Webcast available.
data.description: Frontdoor, Inc., a prominent provider of home warranties in the United States, disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as FTDR, will conduct a conference call on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET). Interested parties can sign up for the webcast through a provided link. The presentation during the conference call will showcase the company's outcomes.

data.title: Karbon Capital Partners allows separate trading of Class A shares and warrants starting January 27, 2026.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Karbon Capital Partners Corp. revealed that starting January 27, 2026, investors holding units from the company's IPO will have the option to trade Class A ordinary shares and warrants separately. This move provides flexibility to shareholders, allowing them to trade these components independently.

data.title: Albertsons appoints Allison Pinkham as EVP and Chief HR Officer.
data.description: Boise, Idaho-based Albertsons Companies has appointed Allison Pinkham as the new Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer. In her new role, Pinkham will oversee all HR functions for the company. This move comes as part of the company's efforts to strengthen its leadership team and optimize its human resources strategy. Albertsons operates over 2,200 retail stores across the United States, with approximately 270,000 employees.

data.title: $164M annual staking revenue from over 2M ETH staked by Bitmine, totaling 4.2M ETH, of which 3.5% is the outstanding supply.
data.description: The Ether treasury, which is publicly traded, currently holds over 2 million ETH staked. In total, it has more than 4.2 million ETH in its possession, amounting to 3.5% of the outstanding supply.

data.title: Northland Power to release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026; earnings call on Feb 26 at 10am ET.
data.description: Toronto-based Northland Power Inc. (TSX: NPI) has revealed plans to unveil its fourth quarter financial performance for 2025 after market closure on February 25, 2026. The company's management is scheduled to conduct an earnings conference call and webcast at 10 a.m. Eastern Time on February 26, 2026. This will be followed by an interactive session for analysts to ask questions regarding the results.
